homepage.heroSubline: Precision excavation for Middle Tennessee's toughest terrain. We handle limestone bedrock, stormwater management, and foundation prep with Nashville-tested methods.
aboutText: Founded in 2012, Apex Excavation started with one backhoe and a commitment to solving Middle Tennessee's unique excavation challenges. Twelve years later, we've prepped sites for everything from East Nashville bungalow additions to Brentwood estate pools.

We don't just move dirt—we engineer solutions. Our team analyzes soil composition, water tables, and slope stability before the first shovel hits ground. That's why architects and developers keep coming back.

When the 2020 tornado hit North Nashville, we volunteered equipment to clear debris. Now we train local crews in proper limestone excavation techniques—because strong foundations build strong communities.

valueProps.title: Bedrock Specialists
valueProps.description: We know how Nashville's limestone shelf behaves in wet weather. No surprises, no cracked foundations.

valueProps.title: Storm-Ready
valueProps.description: Our drainage solutions account for Middle Tennessee's 50+ inches of annual rain and sudden downpours.

valueProps.title: Neighborhood Experts
valueProps.description: From The Gulch's tight lots to Green Hills' sloping yards, we adapt to your site's constraints.

valueProps.title: Full-Site Partners
valueProps.description: We coordinate with your builder, arborist, and utility teams to keep projects moving.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call 555-EXC-R92 for a free site assessment. We'll show you why 800+ Nashville projects start with us.

services.name: Residential Excavation
services.shortDescription: Precision digging for Nashville homes, from historic bungalow additions to luxury pool sites.
services.description:
Middle Tennessee's mix of clay soils, limestone bedrock, and heavy rainfall demands expert residential excavation. We specialize in:

East Nashville's tight lots where century-old tree roots complicate digging. Our mini-excavators navigate narrow alleys without damaging original brick foundations.

Brentwood's sloping estates where improper grading causes drainage issues. We engineer terraces that direct water away from basements while preserving mature oaks.

New construction in Germantown where urban fill requires compaction testing. We stabilize soil before pouring foundations to prevent settling cracks.

Every job includes bedrock assessment, stormwater planning, and debris removal. No leftover piles of dirt—we haul it all.
process: Step 1: Laser-level site survey to identify elevation changes and bedrock depth
Step 2: Mark utilities and protected tree roots with biodegradable paint
Step 3: Excavate with equipment sized for your lot (mini-excavators for urban sites)
Step 4: Grade for drainage, compact soil, and document elevations for your builder
benefits: Prevents foundation cracks from unstable soil
Protects mature landscaping during digging
Meets Metro Nashville stormwater regulations
Cleaner sites with immediate debris removal

faq.question: How do you handle rocky soil in Green Hills?
faq.answer: We use seismic testing to map bedrock before digging. For shallow limestone, we employ hydraulic breakers that minimize vibration damage to nearby homes.

faq.question: Can you excavate my sloped backyard in Hendersonville?
faq.answer: Yes—we stabilize slopes with benching techniques and always maintain a 2:1 safety ratio. No collapsed hillsides on our watch.

services.name: Pool Excavation
services.shortDescription: Expert digging for Nashville's luxury pools, handling limestone and tricky access.
services.description:
Installing a pool in Middle Tennessee means battling bedrock and clay. We've excavated 200+ pools in Brentwood, Franklin, and Green Hills, including:

Infinity pools on steep lots where improper digging causes landslides. Our shoring systems keep hillsides intact during construction.

Custom spas in historic districts where preservation rules limit equipment. We hand-dig within 10 feet of century-old foundations.

Natural pools with boulder features that require precise rock placement. We position stones during excavation to avoid later crane costs.

We coordinate with your pool company to ensure proper depth, plumbing trenches, and equipment pad placement. Our laser-guided grading prevents waterline tilting.
process: Step 1: Soil test to confirm clay content and water table depth
Step 2: Stake out pool shape with 6-inch accuracy
Step 3: Excavate in layers, checking for bedrock every 2 feet
Step 4: Install permanent drainage before backfilling
benefits: Avoids costly bedrock blasting with early detection
Prevents groundwater flooding during construction
Accurate slopes for perfect water levels
No damage to existing patios or landscaping

faq.question: My Franklin yard has underground springs—can you still dig?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We install French drains during excavation to control groundwater. In severe cases, we use well points to temporarily lower the water table.

services.name: Stormwater Management
services.shortDescription: Drainage solutions for Nashville's heavy rains, from French drains to retention ponds.
services.description:
With 50+ inches of annual rainfall and Metro Nashville's strict runoff rules, proper stormwater planning is crucial. We design systems for:

East Nashville bungalows where original clay tile drains fail. We replace them with perforated PVC that won't collapse under oak roots.

Murfreesboro subdivisions where compacted soil causes yard flooding. Our dry wells and swales redirect water without expensive pumps.

Brentwood estates where hillside erosion threatens foundations. We build terraced retaining walls with built-in weep holes.

All work meets Metro Water Services' 2024 regulations. We'll handle your permit paperwork and final inspections.
process: Step 1: Water flow test during simulated 2-inch rainfall
Step 2: Mark underground utilities with ground-penetrating radar
Step 3: Install drainage pipes with clean-out access points
Step 4: Build retention features with native stone for natural look
benefits: Prevents basement flooding during spring storms
Reduces mosquito breeding in standing water
Meets Metro Nashville erosion control laws
Increases property value with proper drainage

faq.question: How deep should French drains be in Hendersonville?
faq.answer: Minimum 18 inches—but near lakefront properties, we go deeper to account for the high water table. We backfill with washed gravel for maximum flow.

services.name: Foundation Excavation
services.shortDescription: Precision digging for stable foundations in Nashville's tricky soil.
services.description:
Middle Tennessee's mix of expansive clay and shallow bedrock demands expert foundation prep. We excavate for:

New construction in The Gulch where urban fill requires soil stabilization. Our vibratory plate compactors achieve 95% density before concrete pours.

Historic home additions in 12South where original foundations lack footings. We underpin existing walls while digging new sections.

Luxury estates in Franklin where uneven settling cracks marble floors. Our laser-leveled pads stay within 1/8-inch tolerance.

We provide engineered soil reports for your architect and handle all Metro permitting. No shortcuts—just foundations that last generations.
process: Step 1: Core sample testing at 4 corners of planned foundation
Step 2: Excavate to frost line (12" minimum in Davidson County)
Step 3: Install gravel base with geotextile fabric for drainage
Step 4: Verify elevation with transit before builder's inspection
benefits: Prevents door/window misalignment from settling
Meets seismic codes for Middle Tennessee
Allows proper waterproofing membrane installation
Reduces long-term concrete repair costs

faq.question: Do you dig basements in Nashville's limestone areas?
faq.answer: Carefully. We use ground-penetrating radar to locate bedrock seams. In Green Hills, we often recommend walk-out designs instead of full basements.

services.name: Land Clearing
services.shortDescription: Thorough lot preparation for Nashville builders and homeowners.
services.description:
Overgrown lots in Middle Tennessee hide sinkholes, buried debris, and unstable soil. Our clearing process includes:

Pre-1950s East Nashville properties where old cisterns and foundations lurk underground. We scan with metal detectors before grinding stumps.

Wooded Brentwood estates where protected species surveys are required. We coordinate with arborists to preserve specimen trees.

Murfreesboro farmland being converted to subdivisions. Our rock pickers remove fieldstones that damage mowers.

We don't just bulldoze—we selectively clear, grade for drainage, and leave buildable pads. All vegetation is recycled as mulch or hauled to approved facilities.
process: Step 1: Survey for protected trees and wildlife habitats
Step 2: Mark utilities and underground hazards
Step 3: Grind stumps 12" below final grade
Step 4: Remove all debris and grade for drainage
benefits: Prevents surprise costs from hidden obstacles
Meets Metro Nashville tree preservation laws
Creates stable building pads
Eco-friendly disposal of cleared vegetation

faq.question: Can you clear my Hendersonville lot without damaging lake views?
faq.answer: Yes—we use directional felling and strategic brush removal. Our team has OSHA-certified climbers for delicate lakeside work.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Apex excavated our infinity pool on a steep Brentwood hillside. They hit bedrock 4 feet down but adapted without blasting—saved us $15K in extra costs. The laser grading was perfect; water level is exact edge-to-edge.

reviews.name: Eleanor W.
reviews.text: After our East Nashville bungalow flooded twice in 2023, Apex installed French drains and a dry well. Not one drop in the basement during last month's 5-inch rain. Crew even matched the original brick walkway.

reviews.name: Derrick S.
reviews.text: Building a garage apartment in The Gulch was a nightmare until Apex stepped in. They navigated tight alleys, compacted the urban fill properly, and got it done before our concrete crew arrived. No settlement cracks after 18 months.

reviews.name: Lila C.
reviews.text: Our Murfreesboro property had 40 years of overgrowth. Apex cleared 2 acres without damaging the old oak we wanted to keep. Found and removed three buried cars (!) from the 1970s. Site is now build-ready.

reviews.name: Greg P.
reviews.text: Added a sunroom to our 1940s Green Hills home. Apex hand-dug near the foundation to avoid vibration damage. They also discovered and repaired a collapsed clay drain tile we didn't know about—saved our crawlspace from mold.

reviews.name: Tanya R.
reviews.text: Franklin's rocky soil scared off two other excavators. Apex used a compact rock saw to carve our pool into bedrock—now we have the only natural stone-edged pool in the neighborhood. Worth every penny.

service-areas.title: Apex Excavation Service Areas | Middle TN
service-areas.description: Serving Nashville, Franklin, Brentwood, Murfreesboro & Hendersonville with expert excavation tailored to each area's soil and bedrock conditions.

serviceAreas.content: Apex Excavation proudly serves Franklin, TN, a city known for its historic downtown and antebellum homes. Our team specializes in excavation projects that respect the historical integrity of the area while providing modern solutions. Whether you're renovating a historic property or building a new home, we ensure precision and care in every project. Franklin's hot, humid summers require excavation work that accounts for weather conditions, and our experienced team is well-equipped to handle these challenges.
serviceAreas.localContext: Franklin is a charming city with a rich history and a growing population of around 85,000 residents.

serviceAreas.content: Apex Excavation is your trusted partner in Murfreesboro, TN, a city known for its affordable family developments. Our services include site preparation, grading, and utility trenching to support the growing housing demand. Murfreesboro's hot, humid summers can impact construction timelines, but our team works efficiently to keep projects on track. We understand the unique needs of this vibrant community and deliver reliable excavation solutions tailored to local conditions.
